phrases.en: Jenny rented a DVD from a video store.
phrases.zh: 珍妮从音像店租了一张DVD。

phrases.en: At home, she took the DVD out of the case.
phrases.zh: 回到家，她把DVD从盒子里取出来。

phrases.en: With the remote, she switched her TV to the DVD setting.
phrases.zh: 她用遥控器把电视切换到DVD模式。

phrases.en: And turned the DVD player on.
She loaded the disc into the tray.
When the menu came up, she selected "Play movie."
phrases.zh: 菜单出现后，她选择了“播放影片”。

phrases.en: She and Tom watched the movie.
phrases.zh: 她和汤姆一起看了电影。

phrases.en: To see something again, they rewound.
phrases.zh: 想重看某个片段时，他们就倒带。

phrases.en: Jenny paused it when Tom left for a minute.
phrases.zh: 汤姆离开一会儿时，珍妮把它暂停了。

phrases.en: At the end of the movie, Jenny pressed the "Stop" button.
phrases.zh: 电影结束时，珍妮按下了“停止”键。

phrases.en: She ejected the disc and put it back in the case.
phrases.zh: 她取出碟片，放回了盒子里。

phrases.en: Later, she returned it to the store.
phrases.zh: 后来，她把它还回了店里。
